title: Finite Random Variable Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite random-variable separate bad pushforward and expectation QF_LRA/Farkas regression seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: Malformed finite random-variable rows where exact replay sums source atom mass 1/4 for the long outcome while the separate QF_LRA row rejects the fixed false distribution claim 1/2, and where exact source and pushforward expectation replay computes 20 while the separate QF_LRA row rejects the fixed false claim 25.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional independence or distribution-law rows only when they add distinct exact-linear solver pressure; keep measurable random variables, conditional expectation, martingales, and continuous distributions in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite random variables as total finite functions from probability atoms to outcome labels.
Replay finite pushforward, expectation, and independence witnesses through exact rational model evaluation.
Keep malformed finite pushforward and expectation replay separate from checked QF_LRA/Farkas rows for isolated exact-linear contradictions.
Keep general measurable functions, conditional expectation, stochastic kernels, martingales, and continuous random variables marked Lean-horizon until no-sorry Lean artifacts exist.
